title: Writing a Basic Python Function
scenario: Write a Python function to calculate the area of a rectangle. The function should take two arguments: 'length' and 'width'.
constraints: Must use a Python function definition
Must use a simple formula to calculate the area

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the function uses a Python function definition and a simple formula to calculate the area.
Verify that the function has correct Python syntax.
Check if the function correctly calculates the area of the rectangle.
